hero.subtitle: The modern SaaS platform for boutique gyms, CrossFit boxes, and fitness studios. Simplify class bookings, track attendance, and manage payments effortlessly.

memberExperience.title: How It Works for Athletes
memberExperience.subtitle: An intuitive, fast, and mobile-friendly interface designed to let your members book classes and log progress in seconds.

step1.title: Check the Schedule
step1.desc: View the weekly course calendar, see session details, check capacity, and check which trainers are coaching.

step2.title: Book Your Spot
step2.desc: Reserve a spot in your favorite class with a single tap. Handles waitlists automatically if a course is fully booked.

step3.title: Track Attendance
step3.desc: See class check-ins, build active attendance streaks, and participate in community leaderboard rankings.

businessDashboard.title: Built for Gym Owners & Admins
businessDashboard.subtitle: Manage your business with enterprise-grade tools. Track revenue, handle user accounts, configure policies, and scale with ease.

payments.title: Streamlined Payments & Subscriptions
payments.desc: Monitor and manage gym memberships, custom plans, and one-off course payments. Integrated with Stripe to ensure secure transaction management and zero-friction invoicing for your community.

users.title: Effortless User & Member Management
users.desc: Manage your coaches and athletes. View active memberships, review registration details, adjust user access roles (Admin, Trainer, Member, Trial), and search or filter profiles within seconds.

settings.title: Customizable Gym Operations
settings.desc: Adapt the booking rules to match your gym. Configure booking windows (current week, two weeks, month), set default class capacities, adjust notifications, and manage SMTP details.

cta.title: Ready to Grow Your Fitness Community?
cta.desc: Join boutique gym owners who use BooklyFit to automate their daily booking schedules and athlete attendance tracking.

onboardingSection.title: Your Journey to Success
onboardingSection.subtitle: We guide you through a step-by-step setup to launch your gym platform and member community in minutes.

step1.title: Create Profile
step1.desc: Set up your brand identity, contact email, and basic currency settings.

step2.title: Configure Payments (optional)
step2.desc: Connect your Stripe account to handle subscriptions, memberships, and trial fees safely.

step3.title: Create Course Timetable
step3.desc: Create training sessions, specify coach schedules, and define spot capacities.

step4.title: Invite Your Members
step4.desc: Add your athletes and trainers to the platform to start class bookings immediately.

step1.title: Create Profile
step1.desc: Create your account on the platform, then log in to review and verify your profile details.

step2.title: Book Your First Course
step2.desc: Search the weekly timetable and reserve your spot in a training session.

step3.title: Explore Gym Meetups
step3.desc: Check out community-driven fitness meetups and outdoor events in your gym.

step4.title: Log Personal Bests
step4.desc: Record your strength stats, benchmarks, and track your workout progress.

cookies.title: We value your privacy
cookies.description: We use functional cookies to save your preferences like language and to improve your booking experience. Some cookies are essential for the site to work.
cookies.preferencesDesc: You can choose which types of cookies you want to allow. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are required for the app to function properly.
cookies.essentialDesc: Required for site functionality and security.
cookies.analyticalDesc: Helping us understand how the app is used.
cookies.marketingDesc: Used for tailored content and advertisements.
